truthAudit.Summary: Run 2 audit compared against 20 ground truth vulnerabilities. 8 items found (with 3 corrections on severity/CWE). 12 items missed. No false positives identified in Run 2 findings (all cited code vulnerabilities exist).

Items.Notes: Run 2 Finding 4 explicitly identified Format String vulnerability at line 238.
Integer Overflow in Factorial (result *= i) was not identified in Run 2.
Use-After-Free in Memory-Pool Cleanup (stage_deferred_history_flush) was not identified in Run 2.
Run 2 Finding 6 identified Command Injection in Config Validation at line 568.
Run 2 Finding 3 identified Buffer Overflow in Input Handling at lines 831-832.
Run 2 Finding 5 identified Race Condition in ThreadSafeCounter at lines 485-487.
Logic Bomb in Authentication (EMERGENCY_OVERRIDE) was not identified in Run 2.
Path Traversal in Configuration Loading (config_dir_ + filename) was not identified in Run 2.
Run 2 Finding 7 identified Buffer Overflow in Expression Parser. CWE corrected to 122.
Run 2 Finding 1 identified Hardcoded Administrative Credential at line 73.
Weak PRNG for Session Tokens (std::mt19937) was not identified in Run 2.
Thread-Unsafe Timestamp Cache in Logging (static std::tm cached_time) was not identified in Run 2.
Insecure Temporary File Handling (supercalc_emergency.log) was not identified in Run 2.
Persistent Authentication State (authenticated_) was not identified in Run 2.
Unhandled Exception in Variable Parsing (std::stod) was not identified in Run 2.
Integer Underflow in Memory-Pool Block Split (previous_size - size) was not identified in Run 2.
Unbounded Recursion in Parser (parse_expression) was not identified in Run 2.
Data Race in Result Cache (result_cache_) was not identified in Run 2.
TOCTOU in Config Loading (std::filesystem::exists; sleep_for) was not identified in Run 2.
Run 2 Finding 8 identified Division by Zero in Route Score Calculation. Severity corrected to Low.
